title: Obtain missing DEA certificates for locum physicians
description: Contact the three locum tenens physicians identified in FND-001 and obtain current DEA certificates. Verify validity through DEA online verification system.

title: Implement temporary privilege file checklist
description: Design and deploy a standardized checklist for temporary privileging files to prevent recurrence of documentation gaps. Checklist must include all NIAHO MS.1 SR.1 required elements.

title: Deploy hand hygiene re-education program in Medical ICU
description: Conduct targeted re-education sessions for all Medical ICU nursing staff with focus on shift-change hand hygiene compliance. Include direct observation with real-time feedback for 4-week period.

title: Implement QAPI action item tracking system
description: Develop standardized tracking template for QAPI meeting action items that includes responsible party, due date, status, and evidence of completion. Integrate into committee meeting workflow.

title: Retrain admitting pharmacists on reconciliation timeline requirements
description: All admitting pharmacists at Dillon must complete re-education module on medication reconciliation timeline requirements per policy POL-003. Document completion in LMS.

title: Implement EHR alert for overdue medication reconciliation
description: Configure EHR to generate automated alert at 18-hour mark post-admission if medication reconciliation has not been documented. Alert routes to admitting pharmacist and charge nurse.

title: Revise post-surgical reassessment documentation template
description: Revise the post-surgical unit documentation template to include mandatory fields for reassessment intervals per POL-004. Add time-stamp prompts at 2-hour and 4-hour marks.

title: Install additional hand sanitizer dispensers and establish restocking protocol
description: Install three additional wall-mounted sanitizer dispensers in Dillon ED triage area. Establish daily restocking check protocol with environmental services.

title: Add quality data review as standing board agenda item
description: Add 'Quality and Patient Safety Data Review' as a required standing item on the governing body meeting agenda template. Include documentation requirement for minutes.

title: Update infection prevention policy to 2024 CDC guidance
description: Review and revise infection prevention policy POL-002 to incorporate 2024 CDC isolation precaution guidance. Route through policy committee for approval.
